steps.title: Prepare mixes for running gels and stacking gels
steps.instruction: Prepare mixes for running gels and stacking gels: Components Running gel Stacking gel 1 30% acrylamide/bis-acrylamide 10 ml 1.6 ml 2 H20 24.6 ml 8.52 ml 3 *TEMED 30 ul 19.2 ul 4 *APS 10% 300 ul 200 ul 5 SDS 10% 400 ul 120 ul 6 Running gel buffer 5 ml N/A 7 Stacking gel buffer N/A 1.52 ml * Add these components right before pouring the gel!

steps.title: Pour running gel in the glass plates assembled with spacers
steps.instruction: Pour running gel in the glass plates assembled with spacers.

steps.title: Add butanol on top of the...
steps.instruction: Add butanol on top of the running gel and wait until the running gel is solidified to wash the butanol off with water.

steps.title: Pour stacking gel on top and insert a suitable comb
steps.instruction: Pour stacking gel on top and insert a suitable comb.

steps.title: Add membranes ( 40 µg protein)...
steps.instruction: Add membranes ( 40 µg protein) or purified protein ( 1 µg ), 10 µL 10x EP buffer solution, milliQ water and whatever you need (compound to test) in a final volume of 95 µL . Keep samples on ice!

steps.title: To start the reaction
steps.instruction: To start the reaction: add 5 µL radioactive ATP mix. Vortex.

steps.title: To prepare radioactive ATP mix (2 μCi, 5
steps.instruction: To prepare radioactive ATP mix (2 μCi, 5.125 micromolar (µM) ), pipet together 5 µL [γ- 32 P] ATP + 110.5 µL 120 micromolar (µM) cold ATP

steps.title: For phosphorylation only
steps.instruction: For phosphorylation only: stop reaction with 400 µL stop solution after desired time.

steps.title: Leave samples on ice for 00:30:00 to precipitate protein
steps.instruction: Leave samples on ice for 00:30:00 to precipitate protein.

steps.title: Aspirate supernatant with pipet, keep in disposable recipient
steps.instruction: Aspirate supernatant with pipet, keep in disposable recipient.

steps.title: Wash pellet with stop solution (...
steps.instruction: Wash pellet with stop solution ( 400 µL ), and 20.000 x g, 4 °C, for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Repeat step 12 and 13
steps.instruction: Repeat step 12 and 13.

steps.title: Dissolve pellet in 40 µL sample buffer
steps.instruction: Dissolve pellet in 40 µL sample buffer.

steps.title: Load 40 µL on acidic gels
steps.instruction: Load 40 µL on acidic gels. Very important to load gel carefully, avoid overflow between wells!

steps.title: Run the gel at 100 V, 04:00:00 4 °C
steps.instruction: Run the gel at 100 V, 04:00:00 4 °C .

steps.title: When the gel run is complete,...
steps.instruction: When the gel run is complete, carefully cut off the blue dye front. This is excess 32 P running ahead of the samples and is not related to ATP13A4 phosphoenzyme which runs at 130 kDa.

steps.title: Soak gel for 00:05:00 in 7
steps.instruction: Soak gel for 00:05:00 in 7.5% acetic acid, and put gel in plastic bag.

steps.title: Expose gel Overnight to phosphoimager cassette
steps.instruction: Expose gel Overnight to phosphoimager cassette.

steps.title: Image cassette using a phosphor imager ( e
steps.instruction: Image cassette using a phosphor imager ( e.g. Typhoon‱ FLA 7000, GE Healthcare).

steps.title: To verify equal sample loading, soak...
steps.instruction: To verify equal sample loading, soak the gel in Coomassie stain Overnight , then wash and evaluate the staining intensity.

steps.title: For dephosphorylation
steps.instruction: For dephosphorylation: 30 s after addition of [γ- 32 P] ATP, add compound to test ( e.g. non-radioactive ATP, ADP and/or polyamines) and stop reaction with 400 µL stop solution after desired time.

steps.title: Once the stacking gel is solidified, store at 4 °C
steps.instruction: Once the stacking gel is solidified, store at 4 °C .

steps.title: Wash pellet with 0
steps.instruction: Wash pellet with 0.3 M hydroxylamine (HA) ( 200 µL ), incubate for 00:15:00 and 20.000 x g, 4 °C, for 00:10:00 .
